sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (user_id UInt32, eventID UInt8, timestamp DateTime, event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY timestamp;
INSERT INTO events (user_id, eventID, timestamp, event_date) VALUES (1, 1003, '2019-01-01 00:00:00', '2019-01-01');
INSERT INTO events (user_id, eventID, timestamp, event_date) VALUES (1, 1009, '2019-01-01 01:00:00', '2019-01-01');
UPDATE events SET eventID = 1007 WHERE user_id = 1 AND eventID = 1003;
SELECT windowFunnel(604800000)(timestamp, eventID = 1003, eventID = 1009, eventID = 1007) AS funnel_count FROM events WHERE event_date BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND '2019-01-07';
